metadata.title: Joutes for Riftbound developers | MCP, Discord and API
metadata.description: Discover Joutes developer tools focused on Riftbound: MCP server, Discord integrations, API and documentation to build around the game.
metadata.ogDescription: Explore Joutes developer features for Riftbound via MCP, Discord and API.

Developers.title: Riftbound developers on Joutes
Developers.intro: A collection of features and integrations designed for tools, bots, AI agents and applications around Riftbound.

mcp.title: MCP for AI agents
mcp.description: Connect your AI assistants to Riftbound data to search cards, rules, erratas and events.

discord.title: Discord integration
discord.description: Automate event announcements, synced standings and card search from Discord.

api.title: Data API
api.description: Access Joutes resources programmatically to build tools, dashboards and workflows around Riftbound.

why.title: Why this section exists
why.description: Joutes exposes structured data and practical integrations so developers can build experiences around the Riftbound metagame.

covered.title: Covered features
covered.description: Each section guides you to a dedicated experience based on the type of integration you want to set up.
covered.mcp: The MCP protocol lets you query rules, cards and events from compatible AI agents.
covered.discord: The Discord bot brings a collaborative experience around events and card search.
covered.api: API endpoints and OpenAPI documentation make integration into third-party applications or automated workflows easier.

explorer.title: Explore the Games
explorer.description: Discover exceptional card and board games for every taste.

toolsCards.title: Cards and resources
toolsCards.description: Access cards, character sheets, and other resources

toolsCollection.title: Collection and trading
toolsCollection.description: Manage your collection, trade with other players, and find rare pieces

toolsRules.title: Game rules
toolsRules.description: Consult the official rules and gameplay guides

toolsPolicies.title: Policies
toolsPolicies.description: Consult policies and rule clarifications written by the community and publishers

toolsDeckChecker.title: Deck checker
toolsDeckChecker.description: Check the legality of your deck and information about its cards

communityMatches.description: Join or create your own games

communityLairs.description: Find places to play near you

metadata.title: Features
metadata.description: Discover everything Joutes offers for your trading card game passion: collection tracking, wishlists, play groups, events and more.

hero.title: for all your trading card games
hero.subtitle: Card catalogs, collection tracking, wishlists, play groups, events… Joutes brings together everything you need to live your TCG passion, solo or with friends.

games.title: A hub for all your games
games.description: Browse card catalogs across multiple TCGs, search by name, set or type, and find everything you need in one place.
bullets: Game pages with news, rules and tools
Built to welcome new games over time

cards.title: Card pages that get straight to the point
cards.description: Every card shows its game-specific properties (domains, traits, cost, might…) along with its errata, rulings and clarifications, sorted intelligently.
bullets: Outdated content is automatically pushed to the bottom

collection.title: Your collection, tracked down to the smallest detail
collection.description: Add your cards with language, condition, foil or purchase price, and track your progress toward the master set and game set of each expansion.
bullets: Detailed completion per set and per game
Foil, language, condition, grading, acquisition price

playGroups.title: Play together with your groups
playGroups.description: Create play groups, share a collection that any member can update, and keep track of who borrowed which card.
bullets: A collection shared across all members

wishlists.title: Wishlists that do the work for you
wishlists.description: Create as many lists as you like, across every game, with private, unlisted or public visibility. Joutes shows at a glance what you already own.
bullets: One-click add from your collection or a card page
Text export to share your list instantly

lairs.title: Local game stores and events near you
lairs.description: Discover game stores (lairs), their events, and sign up in a few seconds.

decks.title: Build and validate your decks
decks.description: Build your decks and check their legality against the game's rules, right inside the app.
bullets: A solid base to prepare for tournaments

leagues.title: Leagues and matches, no spreadsheet needed
leagues.description: Track your leagues, log your matches and standings, without needing a shared spreadsheet.

cta.title: Ready to centralize your passion?
cta.subtitle: Join Joutes for free and start by exploring your first game.
